name: US History
words: Marbury v. Madison [1803 judicial review established]
McCulloch v. Maryland [1819 upheld implied powers]
Gibbons v. Ogden [1824 expanded commerce power]
Dred Scott v. Sandford [1857 denied Black citizenship]
Plessy v. Ferguson [1896 upheld separate but equal]
Brown v. Board of Education [1954 ended school segregation]
Korematsu v. United States [1944 upheld Japanese internment]
Mapp v. Ohio [1961 exclusionary rule applied]
Gideon v. Wainwright [1963 right to counsel guaranteed]
Miranda v. Arizona [1966 Miranda warnings required]
Tinker v. Des Moines [1969 protected student speech]
New York Times v. United States [1971 limited prior restraint]
Roe v. Wade [1973 legalized abortion nationwide]
United States v. Nixon [1974 limited executive privilege]
Regents of UC v. Bakke [1978 limited affirmative action]
Texas v. Johnson [1989 protected flag burning]
Bush v. Gore [2000 halted Florida recount]
Citizens United v. FEC [2010 expanded corporate speech]
Obergefell v. Hodges [2015 legalized same-sex marriage]
Necessary and Proper Clause [implied powers allowed]
Full Faith and Credit Clause [states honor other states]
Privileges and Immunities Clause [protects interstate equality]
General Welfare Clause [spending for common good]
Search and Seizure Clause [bans unreasonable searches]
Due Process Clause (5th) [federal due process guaranteed]
Due Process Clause (14th) [state due process guaranteed]
Assistance of Counsel Clause [guarantees legal counsel]
Cruel and Unusual Punishment Clause [limits harsh penalties]
1st Amendment [1791 freedoms of speech and religion]
6th Amendment [1791 fair and speedy criminal trial]
7th Amendment [1791 jury trial in civil cases]

name: Landforms
words: Valley [low land between hills or mountains]
Canyon [deep, narrow valley with steep sides]
Lake [large body of water surrounded by land]
Delta [triangle-shaped land at a rivers mouth]
Dune [hill of sand shaped by wind]
Desert [very dry land with little rain]
Wetland [land that is often covered with water]
Fjord [narrow sea inlet between steep cliffs]

name: Human Body
words: Respiratory system [brings in oxygen to body]
Digestive system [breaks down food for energy]
Endocrine system [uses hormones to send signals]
Spinal cord [carries messages to and from brain]
Lungs [take in oxygen, release carbon dioxide]
Pancreas [helps digest food and control sugar]
Bladder [stores urine before it leaves body]
Skin [protects body and keeps germs out]
Thyroid [controls how fast body uses energy]

name: Space
words: Sun [star at center of our solar system]
Dwarf planet [small round body orbiting sun]
Meteorite [space rock that hits the ground]
Orbit [path an object follows around another]
Space probe [robot sent to explore space]
Space station [place where astronauts live in orbit]
Galaxy [huge group of stars and planets]
Milky Way [galaxy that holds our solar system]
Lagrange point [spot where gravity balances orbits]
L1 point [gravity-balance point between two bodies]
L2 point [gravity-balance point behind a body]
L3 point [gravity-balance point opposite side of sun]
L4 point [stable gravity point ahead in orbit]
L5 point [stable gravity point behind in orbit]
Asteroid belt [ring of asteroids between Mars and Jupiter]
Kuiper Belt [region of icy bodies beyond Neptune]
Oort Cloud [distant shell of icy objects]

name: Ancient World
words: Ancient Sumer [built early cities and ziggurats]
Babylon [famous law code and hanging gardens]
Ancient Rome [built roads and strong laws]
Byzantine Empire [kept Roman law and learning alive]
Shang Dynasty [early Chinese writing and bronze]
Han Dynasty [expanded trade on Silk Road]
Gupta Empire [advances in math and medicine]
Ancient Persia [built huge empire with roads]

name: Geopolitics

United Nations formed [1945 world group for peace]
Marshall Plan [1948-1952 US helps rebuild Europe]

Vietnam War [1955-1975 conflict in Southeast Asia]
Civil Rights Act [1964 US law banning segregation]
Detente period [1970s eased Cold War tensions]
Soviet Union collapses [1991 ends Cold War era]
Gulf War [1990-1991 US-led force frees Kuwait]
Good Friday Agreement [1998 peace in Northern Ireland]
9/11 attacks [2001 terror attack on United States]
War in Afghanistan [2001-2021 long US-led conflict]
Iraq War [2003-2011 US-led invasion of Iraq]
Paris Climate Agreement [2015 global climate pledge]
Brexit referendum [2016 UK votes to leave EU]

Rebellion of 1837 [1837 armed uprising for reform]
British North America Act [1867 created Dominion of Canada]
Red River Rebellion [1869-1870 Mtis resist land loss]

Protestant Reformation [1517 Luther challenges Catholic Church]
Peace of Westphalia [1648 ended Thirty Years War]

all of Han Dynasty [220 AD empire splits into warlord states]

Inca Empire founded [1438 expanded across Andes]
